strings.app.title: binify
strings.settings.title: binify settings
strings.settings.heading: ⚙  binify settings
strings.settings.path_toggle: Add Bin directory to current-user PATH
strings.settings.context_menu_toggle: Enable Explorer context menu for .exe files
strings.settings.help: Settings are saved for the current user. No administrator permission is required.
strings.settings.saved: Settings saved successfully. Restart binify to apply language changes to all open windows.
strings.entries.name: Name
strings.entries.bin_not_configured: Configure a Bin directory on the Config tab first.
strings.entries.delete_confirm: Delete the selected Bin entry file? The source program will not be deleted.
strings.add.title: Add command with binify
strings.add.heading: ➕  Add command
strings.add.link_mode_help: Auto tries Symbolic Link, then Hard Link, then CMD Wrapper. Explicit modes do not fall back.
strings.add.bin_not_configured: Bin directory is not configured. Open binify normally to configure settings first.
strings.add.configure_first_continue: Bin directory is not configured. Configure settings first; after saving, binify will continue adding the selected executable.
strings.add.configure_bin_before_create: Configure Bin directory before creating commands.
strings.conflict.overwrite_prompt: The command name already exists. Overwrite the following entry?
strings.uninstall.title: binify uninstall cleanup
strings.uninstall.heading: 🗑  Uninstall cleanup
strings.uninstall.summary: Choose which current-user integrations binify should remove before uninstalling. Source executables are never deleted.
strings.uninstall.remove_path: Remove Bin directory from current-user PATH
strings.error.title: binify error
strings.error.unexpected: binify failed with an unexpected error.
strings.error.unknown: binify failed with an unknown error.
